customTitle: Cost: should we move staging to spot?

message.content: Staging is costing us $1.8k/mo on on-demand ECS Fargate. Worth moving to Fargate Spot?

content.text: Probably yes, with one caveat. Fargate Spot is ~70% off on-demand and interruptions are rare in staging-friendly capacity pools — but you do get 2-minute drain notices, so any test run longer than that needs to be re-runnable. If your CI builds the image and your staging deploys are short-lived, you'll save ~$1200/mo with essentially no friction. The risk is long-running staging soak tests being interrupted mid-run; if you have any, route them to a small on-demand sub-cluster. Want me to draft the Terraform change?
